sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86127" key="pragmatoko/pos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πραγμᾰτο-κόπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n86127.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meddler, busybody,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.226S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
